headline: How The Veeva Systems (VEEV) Narrative Is Shifting On Growth AI And Valuation Concerns
summary: Veeva Systems’ fair value estimate holds steady at US$270.93, with the latest price target update matching the prior figure. That stability comes even as Street research has reset many published targets lower, reflecting a tug of war between bullish views on execution and cautious takes on competition, AI impact, and growth expectations. In the sections that follow, you will see how these shifting opinions fit together and what to watch as the Veeva story continues to evolve. Analyst Price...

headline: War? Inflation? The Market Is Moving On.
summary: The cease-fire announced on Tuesday led to the best day for the stock market in almost exactly a year. But it’s too soon to look past the war.

headline: Stocks to Watch Friday: Lumentum, Coherent, Porsche
summary: ↗️ Lumentum (LITE), Coherent (COHR), Corning (GLW): Makers of optical equipment gained premarket after Bloomberg reported that Lumentum is seeing strong AI-related demand. JPMorgan analysts also raised their price targets for Lumentum and Coherent, both of which are backed by Nvidia (NVDA).
